##NAMES=Mosandrite-(Ce)
##RRUFFID=R100097
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_2_(CaCe)[(H_2_O)_2_Ca_0.5_[box]_0.5_]Ti(Si_2_O_7_)_2_(OH)_2_(H_2_O)_2_
##LOCALITY=Granite Mountain #2 Quarry, Arkansas, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Henry Barwood
##DESCRIPTION=Isolated yellowish-brown prismatic crystals in feldspar, associated with dark-green epidote, dark-brown astrophyllite, colorless fluorapatite, pinkish fluorite, and pale yellow monazite. 
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R100097
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
